_Comments._Note: PostgreSQL is the only supported persistent provider. Kiosk mode (Kiosk:Enabled=true) uses in-memory storage and ignores this connection string.

Kiosk._Comment: Enabled=true runs in-memory and auto-seeds demo data. Add Endpoint with a real provider/key/model to make Tracey chat and test runs hit a real LLM. BaseUrl, ApiKey and Model are required when Endpoint is present.

Messaging._Comment: Provider=Redis for the proxy/app split; InProcess for single-process runs.
